children.text: How to read Mail from your mobile
Try out our app for iPhone and Android
Collect all your email into this mailbox
If you have several email accounts, it's much easier to save and read all your messages in one mailbox

You have received this message because you registered on Yandex.Disk. Yandex.Disk is a service for storing all your files, such as documents, videos, and photographs. You can access them from anywhere in the world, and on any device. All you need is internet access. See what you can do with photographs on Yandex.Disk. Create and edit office documents right in your browser. Share
